eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Clark, KS; at 04:13 PM ON MAY 18, 2026 Effective until 07:13 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Clark County residents west of Ashland starting CR 19 west to Hwy 283, and between CR P south to CR Z evacuate to Minneola.  This does not include Ashland City Limits.
